prompt: Create a hyper-realistic surreal digital art portrait of a young adult man suspended in mid-air as if floating or leaping forward, full body visible, head tilted back in transcendent calm, face intentionally softened/blurred for privacy. He wears a mustard yellow outdoor rain jacket over a dark forest-green hoodie, camouflage cargo pants, rugged brown hiking sneakers, and a black backpack strap over one shoulder. His pose is weightless and dynamic: one knee bent upward, the other leg trailing down, one arm relaxed behind him, torso leaning back. The right half of his body is dissolving into a dramatic cloud of black-gray ash, dust, soil fragments, dry leaves, and small debris, as if he is disintegrating into the air. Include exactly 9 visible birds in flight around the explosion of particles, varying in size and distance, with a few close silhouettes and several smaller distant birds. Use a cinematic vertical composition with the figure slightly left of center, a split atmospheric background: smoky teal-gray mist on the left blending into vivid golden-orange on the right. Lighting is moody and high contrast, with warm rim light from the orange side and soft shadow on the teal side. Render with ultra-detailed fabric textures, realistic folds, dust particles, motion blur in the debris, volumetric smoke, shallow depth of field, and a polished hyper-realistic fantasy photography style. No text, no watermark, no frame.
